name: grok-chrome
description: A Chrome side-panel agent that lets xAI Grok inspect and operate the current browser tab with user-approved actions.
author: Cole McIntosh

scripts.check: bun run build && bun test && node --check dist/background/service-worker.js && node --check src/content/page-tools.js && node --check src/sidepanel/panel.js && node --check src/shared/agent-protocol.js
